{{Quote|This is Ram. Ram Zerimar. He's our star sniper. For those ''delicate'' jobs.|[[Goran Beviin]]|<ref name="Bloodlines">''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]''</ref>}}
'''Ram Zerimar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Sniper/Legends|sniper]] during the time of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] stint as [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[40 ABY/Legends|c. 40 ABY]].

==Biography==
Ram Zerimar wore gray [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]], with golden markings on the right half of his armor, and a small, charcoal handprint of his baby adorned his helmet. He favored a [[Verpine shatter gun]].

He accompanied [[Goran Beviin]] along with other Mandalorian [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] to meet Fett at [[Zerria's Bar]] on [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] to discuss whether to accept [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]'s commission to fight for the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]] and defend [[Centerpoint Station]] from the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] while it was being repaired. Zerimar decided—just like the others—it was best not to get involved.

Zerimar later accompanied Fett and several other Mandalorians when Fett was hired as backup by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] during the [[Second Battle of Fondor]]. When they stormed [[Bloodfin (Star Destroyer)|Bloodfin]] in order to take down the [[Moff/Legends|Imperial Moffs]], Ram formed the backup in a [[Tra'kad-class transport|Tra'kad]], together with [[Ghes Orade]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Ramirez.jpg|thumb|195x195px|right|Ramirez at [[Celebration IV]]]]
The character Ram Zerimar is based on [[Raymond Ramirez]], who had a special connection to ''Star Wars'' and [[Karen Traviss]]. His blog "Mando'ade and Their Toys" was featured on [[StarWars.com]].<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=community/news/blog/news20060727.html|text=Featured Blog: ''Mando'ade and Their Toys''}}</ref>
